messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## OCI Functions

### Application

```hcl
resource "oci_functions_application" "app" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name   = "my-function-app"
  subnet_ids     = [oci_core_subnet.fn_subnet.id]
}
```

### Function

```hcl
resource "oci_functions_function" "hello" {
  application_id = oci_functions_application.app.id
  display_name   = "hello-function"
  image          = "fnproject/fdk-python:latest"
  memory_in_mbs  = 256

  config = {
    "FN_INT_TEST" = "value"
  }
}
```

### Invoke

```bash
# Via OCI CLI
oci fn invocation invoke --function-id $FN_OCID --body '{"name":"World"}'

# Via HTTP
curl -X POST https://$FN_ENDPOINT/hello -d '{"name":"World"}'
```

### Environment

- Python, Node, Go, Java
- Docker-based execution
- Pay per invocation
